free_text: Elastic Scattering of Alpha Particles by Helium
The entire scattering chamber was filled with helium
gas at a pressure of about 10 cm/Hg. The helium was
passed continuously through the chamber, the flow
rate being monitored by a How gauge and the pressure
being controlled by a Cartesian manostat which kept
